rationale: Abstract Y is superior across gap framing, journal format adherence, and conclusion calibration, explicitly naming the clinical decision uncertainty operators face and adding a separate Objective section matching JICE's structured format.
loser_weakness: Abstract X lacked a dedicated Objective section (mismatching JICE's structured format), framed the knowledge gap generically, and its conclusion did not explicitly contextualize the single-center limitation or translate findings into clinical guidance.
